guardrails.description: Constraints and guidelines an AI agent should take into account while developing

title.description: Short label for the guardrail (e.g. "No eval", "Prefer immutable data")

description.description: What the agent should take into account or do/avoid

category.description: Category for grouping or filtering (e.g. security, performance, style, accessibility)

priority.description: How strictly the guardrail should be applied
